ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., Common Stock, Unit Trust Fund) */,
  "security_price" REAL /* Current market price of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* More specific sub-industry classification */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price today */,
  "equity_summary_score" TEXT /* Investment summary score from external sources */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Annual dividend yield of the security */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the security */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient of the security */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's data */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Login username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security this data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security for the day */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the security for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status of the security */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "average_price_change" REAL /* Average price change for securities in the sector */,
  "average_market_cap" REAL /* Average market capitalization for securities in the sector */,
  "number_of_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the sector */,
  "total_market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the sector */,
  "median_price_change" REAL /* Median price change for securities in the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment trend */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor rating of the trend */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector affected by the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investment trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investment trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the investment trend information */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector_performance ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rated security */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the security (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments from the analyst about the security */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the given rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analyst's account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analyst's information */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Sector or industry the analyst specializes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the security was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User-defined note about the security in the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used by the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
